page.content: In March 2025, CRH plc's Equipment fleet utilization metrics reveal that 150 excavators with a utilization rate of 85% generated revenue per unit of CHF2,500, while 75 cranes at a 90% utilization rate produced CHF3,000 per unit. Additionally, 100 bulldozers with an 80% utilization rate earned CHF2,000 each, and 120 dump trucks, utilized at 75%, brought in CHF1,800 per unit.

lines.text: In March 2025, CRH plc's Equipment fleet utilization metrics reveal that 150 excavators with a utilization rate of 85%
generated revenue per unit of CHF2,500, while 75 cranes at a 90% utilization rate produced CHF3,000 per unit. Additionally,
100 bulldozers with an 80% utilization rate earned CHF2,000 each, and 120 dump trucks, utilized at 75%, brought in CHF1,800

page.content: The 80 concrete mixers, with a 70% utilization rate, generated CHF2,200 per unit. The total equipment quantity available is 525, with an average utilization rate of 80%, yielding an overall revenue of CHF1,260,000. In contrast, the financial ratios show a price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 15.3, a gross margin of 22.5%, and a net margin of 10.8% for the current period, alongside a current ratio of 1.8 and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.5.

lines.text: The 80 concrete mixers, with a 70% utilization rate, generated CHF2,200 per unit. The total equipment quantity available is
525, with an average utilization rate of 80%, yielding an overall revenue of CHF1,260,000. In contrast, the financial ratios show
a price-to-earnings (P/E) ratio of 15.3, a gross margin of 22.5%, and a net margin of 10.8% for the current period, alongside a
current ratio of 1.8 and a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.5.

page.content: The return on equity stands at 17.2%, with an interest coverage of 4.1, and working capital totaling CHF12M. Comparing these metrics to the industry average, the P/E ratio of 14.7, gross margin at 21.8%, and net margin of 11.5% reflect a slight improvement, with a current ratio of 1.6, a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.6, a return on equity of 16.0%, an interest coverage of 3.9, and working capital of CHF15M, while a comparison with the previous period shows a P/E ratio of 16.0, gross margin of 23.0%, and net margin of 9.5%, alongside a current ratio of 2.0, a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.4, return on equity of 18.5%, interest coverage of 5.2, and working capital of CHF10M.
